AnnouncementBanner.message: Challenges are here — compete in Gauntlet & Time Trial with global leaderboards.

Footer.tagline: Community-contributed practice questions for <link>official GitHub Certifications</link>

Home.heroDescription: Practice with community-contributed questions across all GitHub certification tracks — or test your skills in competitive challenge modes with leaderboards.
Home.heroMockQuestion: You can use permissions to modify the GITHUB_TOKEN on:
Home.communityDescription: This project is shaped by the community. Every question, fix, and improvement comes from people like you.

PracticeTests.label: Practice Tests
PracticeTests.description: Set the number of questions you want, then jump in. Questions are randomized each session.

QuestionsLibrary.label: Question Library
QuestionsLibrary.title: Browse all questions
QuestionsLibrary.description: Explore every question organized by certification track. Pick a category to study at your own pace.
QuestionsLibrary.contributePrompt: Want to contribute? <link>Add your own questions →</link>

QuestionCommon.reportTooltip: Report an issue with this question

ChallengeCommon.pauseBanner: Finish this question — the game will pause before the next one.
ChallengeCommon.pausedHint: Take your time. The timer will restart when you resume.

Quiz.contributePrompt: Enjoying these questions? Help grow the collection.
Quiz.submitDialogDescription: Once submitted, you'll see your score and can review each question.
Quiz.submitDialogWarningUnanswered: You have {count} unanswered questions. These will count as incorrect.
Quiz.submitDialogWarningPartial: You have {count} partially answered questions. These will count as incorrect.
Quiz.submitDialogWarningBoth: You have {unanswered} unanswered and {partial} partially answered questions. These will count as incorrect.

Challenges.label: Challenges
Challenges.description: Put your certification knowledge to the test with high-stakes game modes. Compete for the top of the leaderboard.
Challenges.suggestChallengeDescription: Have an idea for a new challenge mode? Propose it on GitHub and let the community vote. The most popular ideas get built.
Challenges.suggestRule1: Propose a new game mode via GitHub Discussions
Challenges.suggestRule2: Vote on existing ideas with reactions
Challenges.leaderboardEmpty: No scores yet — be first on the board.
Challenges.gauntletRule1: You get {lives} lives — mess up and they're gone forever 💀
Challenges.gauntletRule2: {seconds}s on the clock per question — tick tock!
Challenges.gauntletRule3: Questions pulled from every cert track — no hiding
Challenges.gauntletRule4: Your streak IS your score — survive or cry trying
Challenges.timeTrialRule1: You start with 90 seconds — that's it, good luck ⏱️
Challenges.timeTrialRule2: Nail it? +15 seconds. Keep the clock alive!
Challenges.timeTrialRule4: Clock hits zero = game over. No mercy 🪦
Challenges.signInToSave: Sign in with GitHub to save
Challenges.fullLeaderboardDescription: See who's on top across all challenge modes.
Challenges.signInToSeeRank: Sign in with GitHub to see your rank

Gauntlet.wrongLifeLost: Wrong answer — you lost a life!
Gauntlet.wrongHalfLifeLost: Almost there — lost only half a life!
Gauntlet.timeUpLifeLost: Time's up — you lost a life!

CertDescriptions.actions: Master CI/CD, workflow triggers, jobs, steps, secrets, and GitHub-hosted runners.
CertDescriptions.foundations: Core concepts, repositories, issues, pull requests, GitHub Flow, and Codespaces.
CertDescriptions.advanced_security: Secret scanning, code scanning with CodeQL, security policies, and Dependabot alerts.
CertDescriptions.admin: Managing organizations, teams, permissions, billing, and enterprise-level GitHub.
CertDescriptions.copilot: AI pair programming, prompt engineering, Copilot features, and responsible use.
